Developed by Riddhi Infra Estate LLP, the project is situated near the Outer Ring Road ORR, making it a strategic choice for professionals and families seeking a well-connected home in one of the citys most vibrant residential hubs.Property SpecificationsThis spacious apartment features a super built-up area of 1,625 sq. ft, meticulously designed to offer a balance of aesthetic appeal and functional utility. The layout includes three well-proportioned bedrooms, two modern bathrooms, and four private balconies that provide a refreshing outdoor retreat and ample natural ventilation. With its blend of planned infrastructure and proximity to prominent landmarks like Rajapushpa Provincia, Narsingi provides a tranquil yet highly accessible environment for modern living.
